pricing.refundPolicy: One-time evaluation fee with 30-day access. No recurring billing. No resets on current products.

payouts.schedule: Payout requests available after 5 qualifying trading days. 100% approved payout split. $500 minimum withdrawal. 50% payout consistency rule — no single profitable day may account for 50%+ of total profit since last approved payout. Safety net required for life of PA. Maximum 6 payout requests per PA.

rules.consistencyRule: 50% payout consistency rule: no single profitable day may account for 50% or more of total profit since the last approved payout.
rules.notes: Current products use one-time evaluation fees with 30-day access and no recurring billing. Legacy products (250K, 300K, Static accounts, monthly subscription evaluations) are no longer available for new purchases. Two drawdown models: EOD (trailing End-of-Day drawdown with a fixed Daily Loss Limit) and Intraday (trailing real-time drawdown with no Daily Loss Limit). Vendor options: Rithmic, Tradovate, WealthCharts. Current account sizes: 25K, 50K, 100K, 150K. No minimum trading days to pass evaluation — can be passed in 1 day. PA activation must be completed within 7 calendar days of qualifying. One-time PA activation fee (non-recurring). Tier-based contract scaling on funded Performance Accounts — max contracts and DLL increase by tier. Payout eligibility requires 5 qualifying trading days with minimum daily profit thresholds. Safety net required for life of PA — only profit above the safety net is eligible for withdrawal. Maximum 6 payout requests per PA. $500 minimum payout. 50% payout consistency rule. Purchases must use the trader's own card. US payouts via ACH, international payouts via Plane. Accepts traders from 100+ countries (not US-only) — restricted-country list applies. COMEX and all metals temporarily unavailable. Automated systems, copy trading, and news trading rules are not clearly confirmed in current product documentation.

markets.instruments: Futures — Equity, Currency, Agricultural, Energy, Crypto (micro only), EUREX. COMEX and all metals temporarily unavailable.

support.hours: Help Center, support tickets, FAQs, guides
